Comment: Execution-role policy for the send-push Lambda (index.mjs + fcm-direct.mjs). The sns:DeleteEndpoint statement is REQUIRED for dead-endpoint pruning added in this PR — without it the prune call fails safe and no-ops, and dead FCM/APNs endpoints are resent forever (~96% UNREGISTERED 404s). Tighten Resource ARNs to your account/region before applying; account is 970547373533, region us-east-1 per the registration Lambda's hardcoded Platform App ARNs.
